title: 3D Ores [Whimscape Addon]
description: 3D Ore Overhaul pack Compatible with Whimscape
body:
This was made for [3D Ores overhaul](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-ore-overhaul) to work with [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape)
as addon and is not to replace it

Disclaimer: This pack will update days after 3D Ores Overhaul

I do recommend using [reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) Shaders/[unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) Shaders for a Ore glow  effect looks amazing!
